Title: Coupons & Promotions Page — Authenticated Access and Page Load
Preconditions: User is authenticated as {{USER_EMAIL}}. Store has at least one active public coupon/promotion configured in Admin. Module VirtoCommerce.MarketingExperienceApi deployed.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/dashboard
[WAIT] Dashboard page loads and sidebar is visible
[ASSERT] sidebar Marketing section is visible
[ACT] click 'Coupons & promotions' link in sidebar under Marketing
[WAIT] page URL changes to /account/coupons
[WAIT] page heading visible
Assertions:
[DOM] page heading reads 'All coupons & promotions' (case-insensitive)
[DOM] sidebar link 'Coupons & promotions' is highlighted/active
[DOM] at least one coupon card is visible on the page
[NAV] URL is {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons (or locale-prefixed equivalent)
[FORMAT] page renders without layout broken (no overflow, no missing sections)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql request for promotionCoupons returns HTTP 200
[API] GraphQL response errors[] is empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or unhandled JS errors during page load
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql during coupons page load
Failure_Signals: Page blank after navigation, spinner visible >5s, 4xx/5xx on /graphql, console TypeError, sidebar link missing

Title: Coupons & Promotions Page — Unauthenticated Access Redirects to Sign-In
Preconditions: User is NOT authenticated (no active session). Store is accessible.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] page loads or redirect occurs
Assertions:
[DOM] user is NOT shown the 'All coupons & promotions' page content
[NAV] URL is redirected away from /account/coupons (e.g., to /sign-in or /catalog)
[DOM] sign-in form OR catalog page is visible — not coupons content
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no unhandled JS errors
[NETWORK] no 5xx on redirect request
Failure_Signals: Coupons page content visible to unauthenticated user (security failure), 5xx on redirect

Title: Coupon Card — All Fields Displayed Correctly (Name, Description, Code, Label)
Preconditions: User is authenticated. At least one coupon with name, description, and code exists in the system. Confirmed live coupons include @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) (name: '@td(COUPON_10PCT.promo_name)', description: '@td(COUPON_10PCT.description)') and @td(COUPON_WELCOME.code) (name: '@td(COUPON_WELCOME.promo_name)', description: 'For new customer get a 15% discount for all items').
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[WAIT] coupon cards visible on page
[SCROLL] scroll through all coupon cards
Assertions:
[DOM] each coupon card displays a coupon name (title text, styled heading)
[DOM] each coupon card with a description shows that description text
[DOM] each coupon card displays a 'Click to copy' button containing the coupon code
[FORMAT] coupon code on button is the code as stored (e.g., '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)')
[FORMAT] 'Click to copy' label is visible below the code on the button
[DOM] when a coupon has a label value set, the label text is displayed on the card
[DOM] when a coupon label is null, no empty label element is visible (no broken layout)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql returns coupons data with HTTP 200, errors[] empty
[CONSOLE] no TypeError during render
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on API requests
Failure_Signals: Coupon cards blank or partially rendered, code button missing, console TypeError, spinner >5s, label area shows empty block when label=null

Title: Coupon Code — Click to Copy Copies Code to Clipboard
Preconditions: User is authenticated. At least one coupon with a code is visible on the page. Coupon @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) (promotion: '@td(COUPON_10PCT.promo_name)') is visible on the coupons page.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[WAIT] '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code) Click to copy' button visible
[ACT] click '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code) Click to copy' button
[WAIT] success notification visible
Assertions:
[DOM] toast/notification with text 'Coupon copied successfully' appears
[DOM] notification is dismissible (close button present)
[STATE] clipboard contains the coupon code text '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)' (verified via evaluate)
[DOM] notification disappears automatically after a few seconds OR can be closed manually
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no TypeError or clipboard API errors during copy action
[NETWORK] no API call required for copy (client-side clipboard operation)
Failure_Signals: No notification appears after click, notification text incorrect, console clipboard permission error, spinner visible >3s after click

Title: Copied Coupon Code — Apply to Cart via Coupons Sidebar Yields Correct Discount (E2E)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User is authenticated. Cart has at least one item ({{TEST_SKU}}). Coupon '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)' (promotion: '@td(COUPON_10PCT.promo_name)', 10% off) is active, eligible for the cart contents, and appears in the user's pre-listed available coupons sidebar. Coupon endDate is within the regression window. Theme 2.48.0-pr-2269-cd06 or later deployed.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[ACT] click '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code) Click to copy' button
[WAIT] 'Coupon copied successfully' notification appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loaded with at least 1 item
[SCROLL] scroll down past OrderSummary widget to locate 'Discount & coupons' widget (.coupons-section)
[ASSERT] 'Discount & coupons' widget heading visible
[ASSERT] '@td(COUPON_10PCT.promo_name)' preset coupon card is visible in the widget
[WAIT] locate 'Custom code' card at the bottom of the widget
[ACT] click into the 'Enter custom code' input inside the 'Custom code' card
[KEY] Ctrl+V (paste copied code '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)')
[WAIT] code appears in input
[ACT] click the arrow-right apply button on the 'Custom code' card
[WAIT] card transitions to applied state (green/success border, round-check icon, trash icon visible)
[WAIT] discount reflected in OrderSummary
Assertions:
[DOM] 'Custom code' card shows applied state: success-green border, round-check icon, trash icon
[DOM] Discount line item appears in OrderSummary showing a non-zero amount (e.g., '- $29.80')
[STATE] coupon '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)' card is in applied state within .coupons-section
[MATH] new cart total = subtotal - coupon_discount + shipping + tax
[FORMAT] discount amount displays with currency symbol and 2 decimal places
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] POST /graphql (addCoupon mutation) returns HTTP 200
[API] addCoupon response errors[] is empty
[API] cart.coupons contains code '@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)' with isAppliedSuccessfully=true after apply
[CONSOLE] no TypeError during coupon apply
[NETWORK] no 4xx/5xx on /graphql during coupon apply
Failure_Signals: 'Discount & coupons' widget not found on /cart, custom code card absent, applied state not reached (green border missing), trash icon not visible after apply, spinner >5s, errors[] non-empty, discount amount is zero after successful apply
Cleanup: Click trash icon on applied coupon card to remove @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) after test

Title: Coupon Code Case Fidelity — Lowercase-Stored Code Displayed and Copied in Original Case (Not Uppercased)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User is authenticated. Coupon '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (promotion: '@td(COUPON_SUPER.promo_name)') is stored with a lowercase code and is visible on the /account/coupons page. Cart page is accessible with at least 1 item. Theme 2.48.0-pr-2269-cd06 or later deployed. NOTE: This case currently FAILS pending the VCST-5233 fix — coupon-item.vue applies .toUpperCase() to both the displayed value and the clipboard copy, so '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' is shown/copied as its uppercased form instead of the stored lowercase value.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/account/coupons
[WAIT] 'All coupons & promotions' heading visible
[SCROLL] scroll to the '@td(COUPON_SUPER.promo_name)' coupon card
[ASSERT] '@td(COUPON_SUPER.promo_name)' card is visible
[ASSERT] the coupon code displayed on the card button reads '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (stored lowercase) — NOT its uppercased form
[ACT] click '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code) Click to copy' button (or its displayed label if uppercased by the bug — click the copy button on the card)
[WAIT] 'Coupon copied successfully' notification appears
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loads
[SCROLL] scroll past OrderSummary to 'Discount & coupons' widget (.coupons-section)
[ASSERT] 'Custom code' card visible at bottom of widget
[ACT] click into 'Enter custom code' input on the Custom code card
[KEY] Ctrl+V
[WAIT] code appears in input
Assertions:
[DOM] coupon code displayed on the /account/coupons card button reads exactly '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' — the stored lowercase value (no forced uppercasing, no CSS uppercase transform rendering a different visual value)
[DOM] coupon code pasted into 'Enter custom code' input reads exactly '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (matches the stored code character-for-character; must contain at least one lowercase letter matching the stored code; must NOT equal the all-uppercase form of the stored code)
[DOM] no leading/trailing whitespace in the pasted value
[FORMAT] stored code @td(COUPON_SUPER.code) satisfies /[a-z]/ (contains lowercase letters) — confirming the coupon chosen for this test is lowercase-stored
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] no clipboard errors
[NETWORK] no errors
Failure_Signals: Displayed coupon code on card is the uppercased form of '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (toUpperCase bug active); pasted value in 'Enter custom code' is the uppercase form instead of '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)'; 'Enter custom code' input not found in .coupons-section
Cleanup: none — do not apply the coupon; cleanup not needed as cart is reset in preconditions
References: VCST-4590, VCST-5233 (regression guard — currently FAILS pending fix), Synced: VCST-4896 PR#2269 (2026-04-27)

Title: REST API — Promotion + Coupon CRUD (coupon is a SEPARATE entity via /coupons/add, not an inline promotion field)
Preconditions: Admin user authenticated via OAuth2 token. Marketing module API accessible at {{ADMIN_URL}}. CONTRACT: the Promotion model has NO coupons[] collection — only a HasCoupons bool. Coupons are a separate entity (Coupon{code, promotionId}). Create the promotion FIRST, then attach the coupon via POST /api/marketing/promotions/coupons/add (body: Coupon[]). An inline coupons[] field on the promotion create/update body is silently ignored by the model binder.
Test_Data: admin_url={{ADMIN_URL}}, admin_email={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}, admin_password={{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}, timestamp={{TIMESTAMP}} (generated at runtime as Date.now() or YYYYMMDD-HHmmss), coupon_code=AGENT-TEST-CPN026-{{TIMESTAMP}}
Steps:
[AUTH] POST {{ADMIN_URL}}/connect/token with grant_type=password for {{ADMIN_EMAIL}} to obtain access_token
[WAIT] access_token received
[HTTP] POST {{ADMIN_URL}}/api/marketing/promotions with body: { name: 'AGENT-TEST Promotion CPN-026-{{TIMESTAMP}}', type: 'DynamicPromotion', isActive: true, isPublic: true }
[WAIT] HTTP response
[ASSERT] 200 or 201 status
[VAR] extract {{CREATED_PROMOTION_ID}} from POST response body id field
[HTTP] POST {{ADMIN_URL}}/api/marketing/promotions/coupons/add with body (note: ARRAY of Coupon): [{ promotionId: '{{CREATED_PROMOTION_ID}}', code: 'AGENT-TEST-CPN026-{{TIMESTAMP}}', maxUsesNumber: 0, maxUsesPerUser: 0 }]
[WAIT] HTTP response
[ASSERT] 204 No Content status
[HTTP] GET {{ADMIN_URL}}/api/marketing/promotions/{{CREATED_PROMOTION_ID}}
[WAIT] GET response
[HTTP] POST {{ADMIN_URL}}/api/marketing/promotions/coupons/search with body: { promotionId: '{{CREATED_PROMOTION_ID}}', take: 10, skip: 0 }
[WAIT] coupons search response
[VAR] extract {{CREATED_COUPON_ID}} from the search results item whose code = coupon_code
Assertions:
[STATUS] promotion POST returns HTTP 200 or 201
[BODY] promotion POST response: id is a non-empty string (UUID format)
[STATUS] coupons/add returns HTTP 204 No Content
[BODY] GET promotion response: isPublic = true
[BODY] GET promotion response: isActive = true
[BODY] GET promotion response: hasCoupons = true (flag flips true once a coupon references the promotion)
[BODY] coupons/search response: results contains exactly 1 item with code = coupon_code AND promotionId = {{CREATED_PROMOTION_ID}}
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[API] promotion POST body is valid JSON, no 400 validation error
[API] coupons/add accepts a Coupon[] ARRAY body (a single object 400s)
[API] GET promotion + coupons/search responses HTTP 200
[CONSOLE] no errors
Failure_Signals: HTTP 4xx on promotion POST or coupons/add, isPublic/isActive not persisted, hasCoupons stays false after coupons/add, coupon absent from coupons/search results, coupon code mutated from submitted value. NOTE: an empty/absent coupon after posting coupons INSIDE the promotion body is NOT a product bug — that field does not exist on the Promotion model; the coupon must be added via /coupons/add.
References: VCST-4590; corrected REG-2026-06-01-1306 (coupons are a separate entity via /coupons/add — vc-module-marketing MarketingModulePromotionController; see reference_marketing_coupons_api_contract memory)

[PRE:RESET_CART]

[WAIT] item added to cart

Title: GA4 — Coupon Attribution Starts at begin_checkout (view_cart intentionally omits coupon)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
User is authenticated. Cart has at least one item. Coupon @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) is applied in the cart. GA4 tracking active (collect endpoint *.google-analytics.com/g/collect). CONTRACT (vc-frontend client-app/modules/google-analytics/events.ts): coupon attribution is attached starting at begin_checkout and flows through add_shipping_info / add_payment_info / purchase; view_cart deliberately does NOT include coupon (matches GA4 ecommerce schema — view_cart has no coupon parameter). Verified live REG-2026-06-01-1306.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart loads with coupon @td(COUPON_10PCT.code) applied (discount visible in Order summary)
[ACT] start recording network (filter for /g/collect on *.google-analytics.com) and the dataLayer
[NAV] reload {{FRONT_URL}}/cart to emit a fresh view_cart event with the coupon already applied
[WAIT] a /g/collect request with en=view_cart is observed
[ACT] click 'Proceed to Checkout' / 'Checkout'
[WAIT] checkout page loads and a /g/collect request with en=begin_checkout is observed
Assertions:
[NETWORK] the en=view_cart /g/collect request contains currency, value (epn.value) and item params, and does NOT contain ep.coupon (by design — coupon is not part of GA4 view_cart schema)
[NETWORK] the en=begin_checkout /g/collect request contains ep.coupon=@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)
[NETWORK] if add_shipping_info / add_payment_info fire on this build, each also carries ep.coupon=@td(COUPON_10PCT.code)
[FORMAT] coupon value in the begin_checkout payload matches the applied code exactly (case-sensitive)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] all GA4 /g/collect requests return HTTP 2xx or 302 (not 4xx/5xx)
[CONSOLE] no GA4/gtag errors in browser console
Failure_Signals: begin_checkout missing ep.coupon when a coupon is applied (real GA4 regression), coupon code case-mutated in the begin_checkout payload, GA4 events not firing at all. NOTE: ep.coupon ABSENT from view_cart is NOT a defect — vc-frontend viewCart() intentionally omits coupon; do not assert coupon on view_cart.
Cleanup: Remove the applied coupon (trash icon) after the test; do not place an order
References: VCST-4590; corrected REG-2026-06-01-1306 (coupon attribution starts at begin_checkout, not view_cart — vc-frontend google-analytics/events.ts)

Title: Cart Sidebar — Only Best Coupon Discount Applied When Multiple Applied (BL-CART-009 Radio Policy)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]

[ACT] Apply coupon {{coupon1}} via preset card Apply button
[WAIT] Wait for discount to apply
[ASSERT] Verify discount from {{coupon1}} is applied; note the discount amount D1
[ACT] Apply coupon {{coupon2}} via preset card Apply button (if second apply is allowed by UI)
[WAIT] Wait for cart recalculation
[ASSERT] Verify final discount reflects only the better of D1 or D2 (BL-CART-009: best-reward policy)
[ASSERT] Verify the cart does not double-stack both discounts
Assertions:
[MATH] Final discount = max(D1, D2) — only the larger discount is applied under BestReward policy
[STATE] BL-CART-009: BestRewardPromotionPolicy selects the single highest-value reward; both coupons do not stack

Cross_Layer_Checks:
[NETWORK] Cart GraphQL response discountTotal consistent with best-reward calculation; no errors[]
[CONSOLE] no JS errors when applying a second coupon to a cart that already has one applied
Failure_Signals: both coupons stack beyond BestReward policy (BL-CART-009 violation — only if store uses BestReward); second coupon application throws unhandled error; discount total drops to 0 after second coupon applied; cart total increases after second coupon
Cleanup: Remove all applied coupons; navigate away from cart

Title: Cart Page — Renders Without JS Error When promotionCoupons Field Is Absent (xMarketing Module Not Installed)
Preconditions:
[PRE:SIGNIN_AS:USER_DEFAULT]
[PRE:RESET_CART]
- At least 1 product added to cart.
- @needs-env-without-xmarketing: this case requires an environment where the VirtoCommerce.MarketingExperienceApi (x-marketing) module is NOT installed. On vcst-qa the module IS installed; run this case on an env without it (virtostart stripped instance or a dedicated no-xmarketing env). The fix under test (PR vc-frontend #2305) makes the frontend conditionally skip the promotionCoupons query when the field is absent from the schema — so on a normal env with the module present the coupon sidebar renders normally. The regression contract: absent module + PR fix = cart renders fine + no console error.
Steps:
[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart
[WAIT] cart page loaded with at least 1 item
[ASSERT] browser_snapshot — confirm cart line items visible and page not blank
[WAIT] 2s for all GraphQL requests to settle
[ACT] open browser console and check for JS errors
Assertions:
[DOM] cart page renders with all expected sections (line items, totals, checkout button) — no blank/broken layout
[STATE] coupon/discounts sidebar section is either absent or shows graceful empty state — no error state, no spinner stuck indefinitely
[STATE] NO JavaScript TypeError, UnhandledPromiseRejection, or 'Cannot query field promotionCoupons' error in console (regression contract for VCST-5106 fix)
Cross_Layer_Checks:
[CONSOLE] zero console errors related to promotionCoupons (the bug was: 'Cannot query field promotionCoupons on type Query' causing a hard frontend error)
[NETWORK] if promotionCoupons request fires, it is NOT made when the field is absent from schema (vc-frontend #2305 fix: guard against absent field); if it does fire, it must not crash the page
[NETWORK] no 5xx on /graphql during cart page load
Failure_Signals: 'Cannot query field promotionCoupons on type Query' error in console (VCST-5106 regression); cart page blank or partially rendered; spinner in coupon sidebar visible >5s; UnhandledPromiseRejection in console

NOTE: This case currently FAILS pending the VCST-5233 fix — coupon-item.vue force-uppercases both display and clipboard values, and the xAPI ValidateCoupon mutation is case-sensitive (uppercase code validates false).
Steps:

[NAV] {{FRONT_URL}}/cart

[ASSERT] input value equals '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (stored lowercase) — NOT the uppercased form
[ACT] click the arrow-right apply button on the 'Custom code' card

Assertions:
[DOM] coupon code displayed on /account/coupons card button equals '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (contains lowercase, matches stored value exactly)
[STATE] clipboard content after copy equals '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' — character-for-character match with the stored code; does NOT equal the uppercased form of '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)'
[DOM] pasted value in 'Enter custom code' input equals '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' (stored lowercase)
[DOM] 'Custom code' card transitions to applied state: success-green border, round-check icon, trash icon visible

[API] POST /graphql (addCoupon mutation) returns HTTP 200, errors[] empty, cart.coupons contains '@td(COUPON_SUPER.code)' with isAppliedSuccessfully=true

References: VCST-5233 (regression guard — currently FAILS pending fix; root cause: coupon-item.vue line ~12 @click="copyCoupon(coupon.couponCode?.toUpperCase())" and {{ coupon.couponCode?.toUpperCase() }} + CSS uppercase class; fix: remove toUpperCase() calls and uppercase CSS), BL-PRICE-001, ECL-1.3
